calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-24-2012 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-30-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonai Wong #11288.

Anthony Chu, Esq. appeared for plaintiff East Bay LLC.
Plaintiff Witness Joanna Cheung, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defendant Jian Xin Wang.

After hearing the testimony and considering the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defendant Jian Xin Wang as follows:

Attorney's Fees - $15,000.00
Contract $5,000.00
Un-Lic contractor $62,000.00
Discover Sanctions $1,195.00
Costs - $475.00.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $63,670.00
Counsel to prepare Judgment and submit to Dept. 514 for signature.

02-09-12
Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Off Calendar

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2012 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4 (Administrative Fee) is scheduled this day. Defendant is sanctioned $250.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set due to the proximity of the trial date. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2011 Continued To Jan-12-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Self-represented Defendant for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered continued to 1/12/2012 at 2:00 PM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Roberto Ripamonti, Esq. of Isac, Wu, Chow & Yee, 415-777-1688 for defendant and moving party Jian Zin Wang
Court Call Appearance:Anthony Chu, Esq., 626-262-1839 for plaintiff and opposing party East Bay LLC

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court DENIED AS UNTIMELY DEFENDANT JIAN WANG'S Special Motion To Strike Causes Of Action One And Two Of The Complaint Of East Bay Llc Pursuant To Cccp 425.16(Anti-Slapp) And For Attorneys Fees And Costs. Plaintiff's request for sanctions denied. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol Karen CSR # 8189 301/PJB
